zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Hastings於1242年出生在英國越可爾皮克林時，他的父親Nicholas De Hastings18歲，母親Emmeline de Héron17歲。他於大約1276年與Beatrice在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1270年住在英國瓦維其可爾費隆格利。他去世於1302年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Hastings于1242年出生在英国越可爾皮克林时，他的父亲Nicholas De Hastings18岁，母亲Emmeline de Héron17岁。他于大约1276年与Beatrice在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1270年住在英国瓦維其可爾費隆格利。他去世于1302年在英国英格兰越可爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Hastings was born in 1242, in Pickering, Yorkshire, England, his father, Nicholas De Hastings, was 18 and his mother, Emmeline de Héron, was 17. He married Beatrice about 1276, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He lived in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England in 1270. He died in 1302, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Hastings est né en 1242, à Pickering, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas De Hastings, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Emmeline de Héron, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice environ 1276, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il a vécu à Fillongley, Warwickshire, Angleterre en 1270. Il est décédé en 1302, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Hastings 1242 in Pickering, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas De Hastings 18 und seine Mutter Emmeline de Héron 17. Er hat um 1276 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Beatrice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1270 hat er in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England gelebt. Er starb 1302 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Hastings è nato il nel 1242 nel Pickering, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas De Hastings, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Emmeline de Héron, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice circa 1276, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Vissuto a Fillongley, Warwickshire, England nel 1270. Morì nel 1302, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Hastingsが1242年にイギリスヨークシュアイアピッカーイングで生まれた時，父Nicholas De Hastingsは18歳，母Emmeline de Héronは17歳であった。約1276年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでBeatriceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1270年にはイギリスワーウィクシュアイアフィロングリーに住んでいた。彼は1302年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Hastings(이)가 1242년 영국 요르크실르 피커잉에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas De Hastings(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Emmeline de Héron(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1276년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Beatrice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1270년도에 영국 워윅실르 피론글리에서 살았다. 그는 1302년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Hastings nasceu em 1242, em Pickering, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas De Hastings, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Emmeline de Héron, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice aproximadamente 1276, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele viveu em Fillongley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra em 1270. Ele faleceu em 1302, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Hastings родился в 1242 г. в местности пиккиринг, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas De Hastings было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Emmeline de Héron, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice около 1276 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он жил в местности филлонгли, варвиккшир, Англия в 1270 году. Он умер в 1302 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Hastings nació en 1242, en Pickering, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas De Hastings, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Emmeline de Héron, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Beatrice aproximadamente 1276, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Vivió en Fillongley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra en 1270. Murió en 1302, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
